title: The Energy-Climate Challenge: Issues for the New U.S. Administration
summary: More than 75 percent of the world's energy supply come from oil, coal, and natural gas. Recent evidence has strengthened our understanding of the link between fossil fuel use and global warming. How can we best address the challenges of climate change, given the importance of energy for economic prosperity?
body: More than 75 percent of the world's energy supply come from oil, coal, and natural gas. Recent evidence has strengthened our understanding of the link between fossil fuel use and global warming. How can we best address the challenges of climate change, given the importance of energy for economic prosperity?
